Engine Overheating.symptoms_en: Temperature gauge shows red; coolant boiling; loss of power.
Engine Overheating.solution_en: Stop immediately. Clean the radiator fins from dust. Check coolant level and top up if needed. Inspect the fan belt for looseness.

Hydraulic Lift Failure.symptoms_en: Implement does not lift or lifts very slowly.
Hydraulic Lift Failure.solution_en: Check hydraulic oil level. Replace dirty hydraulic filter. Ensure the pump pressure is optimal.

Cutter Bar Jamming.symptoms_en: Crop is not cutting cleanly; unusual noise from the front header.
Cutter Bar Jamming.solution_en: Turn off the engine. Clear entangled crop manually. Sharpen or replace broken knife sections. Lubricate the cutter bar.

Grain Loss in Chaff.symptoms_en: Good grains are flying out from the back with the straw.
Grain Loss in Chaff.solution_en: Reduce cylinder RPM. Increase the concave clearance. Adjust the blower fan speed to prevent blowing away heavy grains.

Heavy Vibration.solution_en: Check for broken or missing blades and replace them in pairs to maintain balance. Tighten all loose nuts and bolts.

Uneven Seed Dropping.symptoms_en: Patches of field have no seeds while others have too many.
Uneven Seed Dropping.solution_en: Clean the seed metering mechanism. Remove blockages in the delivery tubes. Calibrate the seed rate setting before entering the field.

Low Pressure Delivery.symptoms_en: Chemical liquid is not converting into a fine mist; dripping heavily.
Low Pressure Delivery.solution_en: Clean the nozzle tip with a soft brush. Wash the suction filter. Check the pump washer/seal for wear and tear and replace if leaking.

Motor Runs but No Water.symptoms_en: Humming sound from the starter panel, but no water from the delivery pipe.
Motor Runs but No Water.solution_en: Check if the water table has gone down. Inspect for air lock in the pipe. Verify that the voltage is adequate (at least 220V/440V depending on phase).

Tine Breakage.symptoms_en: Tilling depth is shallow and irregular.
Tine Breakage.solution_en: Avoid using in extremely dry and hard soil. Replace broken tines immediately. Maintain proper gear speed according to soil condition.

Grain Breakage.symptoms_en: Too many broken or crushed grains in the final output.
Grain Breakage.solution_en: Decrease the threshing drum speed. Increase the gap between the drum and the concave net. Ensure the crop is not overly dried.

Frame Bending.symptoms_en: Tractor pulls to one side; uneven depth of plowing.
Frame Bending.solution_en: Straighten the frame at a workshop. Ensure you lift the cultivator completely while turning the tractor at the end of the field.

Clogged Emitters (Drippers).symptoms_en: Water is not dripping from specific points on the lateral pipe.
Clogged Emitters (Drippers).solution_en: Flush the lateral lines by opening the end caps. Clean the main screen/disc filter at the pump station. Use acid treatment periodically for scaling.
